title: racosperma delibratum
intro: Racosperma delibratum, also known as Acacia delibrata, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae. It is native to the savannas and grasslands of tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Racosperma delibratum include reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and aiding in the treatment of digestive issues, and can be prepared in herbal teas and infusions.
